mapper.select: SELECT a.*, COALESCE(b.sys09_code, '') AS sys13_code, COALESCE(b.sys09_name, '') AS sys13_name FROM sys13_code_group a LEFT OUTER JOIN sys09_code b ON a.sys13_code_id = b.sys09_code_id WHERE sys13_code_group_id = #{codeGroupId}
SELECT * FROM sys13_code_group WHERE sys13_code_kind_id = #{codeKindId} AND sys13_code_id = 0 ORDER BY sys13_kind_group_cd, sys13_kind_group_nm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys13_code_group (sys13_kind_group_cd, sys13_kind_group_nm, sys13_code_kind_id, sys13_code_id) VALUES (#{kindGroupCode}, #{kindGroupName}, #{codeKindId}, #{codeId})
